message:
chore(data-pipeline): Remove invalid Lambda PDB ID 8K35

Verified all 12 catalog phages have working PDB IDs on RCSB.
Removed 8K35 from Lambda phage as it returns 404.
7VI9 remains as the valid Lambda PDB ID.

All other PDB IDs verified working:
7VI9, 5VF3, 3J4G, 2BPA, 2MS2, 2MJZ, 5UU5, 1MN8, 4FCY, 4BTG, 5Y24, 8ZVI

Closes: phage_explorer-z49z

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ export const PHAGE_CATALOG: PhageCatalogEntry[] = [
     genomeType: 'dsDNA',
     baltimoreGroup: 'I',
     description: 'Lambda phage is a temperate bacteriophage that infects E. coli. It has an icosahedral capsid and a long, flexible tail. Famous for its role in molecular biology research.',
-    pdbIds: ['7VI9', '8K35'],
+    pdbIds: ['7VI9'],  // 8K35 no longer available on RCSB
   },

     slug: 't4',
